message:
fix(metrics): remove duplicate record_request call that double-counted all invocations

handle_invoke() was calling record_request(true) optimistically before the
actual invocation AND record_request(result.is_ok()) after. This caused:
- requests_total inflated by 2x
- On failure: both requests_success AND requests_error incremented
- Cost dashboards and rate-limiting decisions based on these metrics wrong

Remove the first (optimistic) call, keeping only the post-invocation call
that records the actual outcome.

Affects both OpenAI and Anthropic connectors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
